steps.title: Spot the contrast signal
steps.content: The word “instead” shows the romantic style does something different, indicating the realist style does the opposite of accentuating positive traits.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
The realist style rejected the romantic conventions, so choice B fits. The other three either suggest similarity or continuation, which contradict the contrast signaled by “instead.”
That matches choice B — B is correct.
